lines.speaker: Yami
lines.text: Yes, you fool?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me?

lines.speaker: Yami
lines.text: You looked like you wanted to speak to me, you halfwit. You dullard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's enough.

lines.speaker: Yami
lines.text: My contract stipulates that I must follow you, you insufferable ignoramus. My contract does not stipulate that I must be polite, you ignorant buffoon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What have I ever done to you?

lines.speaker: Yami
lines.text: How about parading me around like a trophy, you idiot clown? How about stuffing me in your rotten backpack, you inclement cretin? How about-

lines.speaker: Yami
lines.text: -locking me in your house, you absolutely intolerable moron.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I get the idea.

lines.speaker: Yami
lines.text: Good. Release me, then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why would I do that after all of that rudeness?

lines.speaker: Yami
lines.text: Bah!

lines.speaker: Yami
lines.text: I do not have the patience for you today.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I just want to chat.

lines.speaker: Yami
lines.text: You want to 'chat'? It is not enough that I must stare at your backside all day, I must suffer your sorry attempts at conversation as well?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well if you're going to be rude, I'll find somebody else.

lines.speaker: Yami
lines.text: Somebody else? Who? Introduce me to this paragon of virtue, who can tolerate the torrent of spittle you call speech. The incoherent messes you call sentences.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have plenty of friends!

lines.speaker: Yami
lines.text: Oh yes, your friends. And do these friends, perhaps, live very far away? Are they perhaps too busy to meet up frequently?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Yami
lines.text: If anybody wanted to 'chat' with you, you wouldn't be speaking to somebody contractually obliged to do so.

lines.speaker: Yami
lines.text: The next time I am left stranded by your incompetence, which I'm sure won't take long, do us both a favour and don't reclaim me.

sections.title: Battling another pet in the arena in the Menagerie

lines.speaker: Yami
lines.text: I could incinerate you if I wanted.

lines.speaker: Yami
lines.text: I'm holding back because this house is actually habitable.

lines.speaker: Yami
lines.text: Oh no.

lines.speaker: Yami
lines.text: Get your hands off of m-
